requiresAttention.description: If `true`, the workflow has issues that require user attention.

ownerId.description: Numeric identifier of the workflow owner.

repository.description: Source repository URL or path for the workflow project.

submit.description: Timestamp when the workflow was submitted.

dateCreated.description: Timestamp when the workflow record was created.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the workflow record was last updated.

runName.description: Workflow run name. Must be unique within the session.

sessionId.description: Nextflow session identifier for the workflow run.

profile.description: Nextflow profile or profile selection used for the run.

commitId.description: Source control commit identifier for the workflow run.

userName.description: Username reported for the workflow owner.

scriptId.description: Internal script or pipeline identifier associated with the run.

revision.description: Source control revision, branch, or tag used for the run.

commandLine.description: Full command line used to launch the workflow.

projectName.description: Pipeline or project name reported by Nextflow.

launchId.description: Legacy launch identifier associated with the workflow.

configFiles.description: Array of configuration files used for the workflow run.

configText.description: Inline Nextflow configuration text used for the run.

nextflowVersion.description: Nextflow version declared by the pipeline manifest.

defaultBranch.description: Default source control branch declared by the manifest.

version.description: Pipeline version declared by the manifest.

homePage.description: Pipeline homepage URL declared by the manifest.

gitmodules.description: Comma-separated git submodule paths declared by the manifest.

description.description: Pipeline description declared by the manifest.

name.description: Pipeline name declared by the manifest.

mainScript.description: Main workflow script filename declared by the manifest.

author.description: Pipeline author declared by the manifest.

icon.description: Relative path or URL for the pipeline icon.

version.description: Nextflow runtime version used for the workflow run.

timestamp.description: Timestamp associated with the reported Nextflow build.

computeTimeFmt.description: Human-readable total compute time across workflow tasks.

cachedPct.description: Percentage of tasks satisfied from cache.

ignoredPct.description: Percentage of tasks that were ignored.

cachedDuration.description: Aggregate duration in milliseconds for cached tasks.

failedDuration.description: Aggregate duration in milliseconds for failed tasks.

succeedDuration.description: Aggregate duration in milliseconds for successful tasks.

enabled.description: If `true`, Fusion was enabled for the workflow run.

version.description: Fusion version reported for the workflow run.

enabled.description: If `true`, Wave was enabled for the workflow run.

errorMessage.description: Summarized task error message associated with the workflow failure.

errorReport.description: Detailed error report associated with the workflow failure.

deleted.description: If `true`, the workflow record has been soft-deleted.

projectDir.description: Local project directory used for the workflow run.

homeDir.description: Home directory used by the workflow runtime.

containerEngine.description: Container engine used for workflow execution.

scriptFile.description: Resolved path to the executed workflow script.

launchDir.description: Directory from which the workflow was launched.

resume.description: If `true`, the workflow was launched with resume enabled.

logFile.description: Path to the workflow log file.

outFile.description: Path to the workflow standard output file.

operationId.description: Internal operation identifier associated with the workflow launch.

resource.description: Whether this is a resource label (applied to workflow tasks for compute resource allocation).

isDefault.description: Whether this label is automatically applied to new resources by default.

isDynamic.description: Whether this label's value can be dynamically computed from workflow metadata.

isInterpolated.description: Whether this label contains interpolated variables resolved at runtime.

dateCreated.description: Timestamp when the label was created.

items.description: Label object for categorizing and organizing resources (workflows, pipelines, compute environments, actions, datasets).
items.title: LabelDbDto
